control.description-key: LeanToolKit conditions card — a set of winning conditions rated good/issue over a rolling window ending today. Granularity picks the grain (day, weekday, week, or two shifts split diagonally). Hold a cell to raise an action.

property.name: inputJSON
property.description-key: Card document to preload: {schema, meta, data:{ratings}}. Ratings keyed condition|periodDate (plus |D or |N for shifts).

property.name: conditions
property.description-key: The winning conditions to track, one row each — with an optional prompt shown under each. A JSON object keyed by condition ({"Staffing":"Crew to plan?"}), a JSON array of strings or {name, prompt} objects, or a plain CSV of names.

property.name: granularity
property.description-key: Grain of each column: one per day, weekdays only, whole weeks, or two shifts (day/night) split diagonally in the cell.

property.name: asOfDate
property.description-key: The date the rolling window ends on (yyyy-mm-dd). Leave empty for today; set it (e.g. Text(SelectedDate,'[$-en-US]yyyy-mm-dd')) to retrospectively review a past period.

property.name: settingsJSON
property.description-key: Consolidated configuration: {title, prompts, readOnly, theme:{background,foreground,accent,legend,font}, config:{...card-specific keys named after the discrete inputs...}}. Settings are the base; a non-empty discrete text input overrides its key (enum/boolean inputs: the settings key wins when present).

property.name: resetTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads the control from Input JSON + Actions Input whenever this value CHANGES (e.g. Set(varReset, Text(Now()))).

property.name: outputJSON
property.description-key: The edited card document (no actions — see Actions Output). Read in OnChange and Patch to Dataverse.

property.name: actionsInputJSON
property.description-key: Actions for this card instance, from the central actions table: JSON(Filter(Actions, InstanceId = ...)). Canonical action array.

property.name: actionsOutputJSON
property.description-key: The full current action set, each stamped with Instance Id. Upsert by action id into the central actions table in OnChange. Actions are never hard-deleted — deleting a cause cancels its actions.

property.name: instanceId
property.description-key: Identity of this card instance (e.g. the Dataverse row GUID it is saved against). Stamped on every emitted action.

property.name: peopleJSON
property.description-key: People available for action assignment: [{whoId, who}].

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar. Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching prompts: plain text, or JSON array of strings / {field, hint} objects. Shown as empty-state text, an info popover, and field hints.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for the problem card, buttons and highlights. Default rich black.

property.name: legendColors
property.description-key: JSON array or CSV: [unused, Good, Issue] colours. Defaults green / red for Good / Issue.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, disables all editing (display mode).

property.name: pngExport
property.description-key: Read-only PNG snapshot as a data URI, for an Image control or Power Automate.

property.name: svgExport
property.description-key: Read-only SVG snapshot markup, refreshed after each change. Use as an Image control source via "data:image/svg+xml;utf8, " & EncodeUrl(Self.Output) or store next to the card.
